# Cosmedocs

> Doctor-led aesthetic medicine clinic on Harley Street, London. Founded 2006 by Dr Ahmed Haq. Truth-first, invisible-art philosophy — minimal, natural, never exaggerated. We work with PrivaDr Ltd, 10 Harley Street, London W1G 9PF for all CQC required treatments.

Our motto: *Our aesthetics is invisible art.* Bold • Natural • Always Your Way.

Cosmedocs is a doctor-led (not injector-led) clinic specialising in anti-wrinkle injections, dermal fillers, skin rejuvenation, lasers and medical aesthetics. Treatments are performed by GMC-registered doctors. Average patient rating 4.9 from verified reviews. Instagram @cosmedocs (124K followers).

## About

- [About Cosmedocs](https://www.cosmedocs.com/about-us/): Clinic history, philosophy, doctor-led model and the invisible-art approach.
- [Our Team](https://www.cosmedocs.com/our-team/): GMC-registered doctors and clinicians.
- [Dr Ahmed Haq — Medical Director](https://www.cosmedocs.com/our-team/dr-ahmed-haq/): Founder, peer-reviewed author (Aesthet Surg J 2022, JAAD 2022).
- [Dr Hena Haq](https://www.cosmedocs.com/our-team/dr-hena-haq/): Aesthetic physician.
- [Harley Street Consulting Rooms](https://www.cosmedocs.com/harley-street-consulting-rooms/): 10 Harley Street, London W1G 9PF.
- [Safety](https://www.cosmedocs.com/safety/): Clinical governance, complication protocols, Hyalase availability.

## Treatments — Anti-Wrinkle (Botox)

- [Anti-Wrinkle Treatment (Botox) hub](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/botox/): Doctor-led botulinum toxin for forehead, frown, crow's feet. £175 standalone or £50 add-on.
- [Ultimate Botox Guide](https://www.cosmedocs.com/ultimate-botox-guide/): 10-chapter long-form clinical guide.
- [Botox Cost UK](https://www.cosmedocs.com/botox-cost-uk/): Transparent pricing pillar.
- [Botox Units Explained](https://www.cosmedocs.com/botox-units-explained/): Dosing per anatomical area.
- [How Long Does Botox Last](https://www.cosmedocs.com/how-long-does-botox-last/): Duration, top-ups, longevity factors.
- [Cheap vs Expensive Botox](https://www.cosmedocs.com/cheap-botox-vs-expensive/): Why doctor-led pricing differs.
- [Botox Price London](https://www.cosmedocs.com/botox-price-london/): London market pricing context.
- [Masseter Botox](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/masseter-botox/): Jaw slimming and bruxism — its own treatment, not a cosmetic add-on.
- [Botox FAQs](https://www.cosmedocs.com/botox-faqs/): Clinical Q&A.

## Treatments — Dermal Fillers

- [Dermal Fillers hub](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/dermal-fillers/): HA filler treatments by anatomical area.
- [Lip Fillers (0.5ml / 1ml)](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/lip-fillers/): Predictable, natural lip enhancement — Secret Filler Cocktail.
- [Cheek Fillers (1/2/4ml)](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/cheek-fillers/): Volume restoration and contouring.
- [Jawline Filler](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/jawline-filler/): Lower face definition.
- [Chin Filler](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/chin-filler/): Profile balance, profiloplasty.
- [Tear Trough Filler](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/tear-trough-filler/): Under-eye hollowing correction.
- [Temple Filler](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/temple-filler/): Temporal volume restoration.
- [Nose Filler (non-surgical rhinoplasty)](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/nose-filler/): £450 fillers or £950 PCL threads.
- [HA Makeover (8/11-point lift)](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/ha-makeover/): Full-face filler protocol.
- [Filler Dissolving (Hyalase)](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/filler-dissolving/): Elective and emergency dissolving protocols.

## Treatments — Skin Rejuvenation

- [Skin Rejuvenation hub](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/skin-rejuvenation/): Regenerative treatments.
- [Profhilo](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/profhilo/): Bio-remodelling hyaluronic acid.
- [Polynucleotides](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/polynucleotides/): DNA-based skin repair.
- [PRP Vampire Facial](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/prp-vampire-facial/): Platelet-rich plasma.
- [Microneedling](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/microneedling/): Collagen induction therapy.
- [Chemical Peels](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/chemical-peels/): Skin-specialist-led medical peels.
- [PDO Threads](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/pdo-threads/): Cog and mono thread lifting.

## Treatments — Lasers

- [Laser Treatments hub](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/laser-treatments/): Medical laser platform.
- [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/laser-hair-removal/): Glow & Go, 3000W AI tech.
- [Endolift London (Laser Fibre Lift)](https://www.cosmedocs.com/endolift-london/): Dual-wavelength Endolaser.
- [CO2 Laser](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/co2-laser/): Ablative resurfacing.
- [Pico Laser](https://www.cosmedocs.com/treatments/pico-laser/): Pigmentation and tattoo removal.

## Medical

- [Medical hub](https://www.cosmedocs.com/medical/): Doctor-only medical aesthetic and dermatology treatments.
- [Botox for Migraines](https://www.cosmedocs.com/medical/botox-for-migraines/): Chronic migraine protocol.
- [Botox for Hyperhidrosis](https://www.cosmedocs.com/medical/botox-for-hyperhidrosis/): Excessive sweating.
- [Private GP Doctor](https://www.cosmedocs.com/private-gp-doctor/): GMC-registered private GP service.

## Comparisons (doctor-written "vs" guides)

- [Botox vs Dysport](https://www.cosmedocs.com/botox-vs-dysport/): Onset, spread, dosing, longevity — doctor's honest comparison.
- [Profhilo vs Sunekos](https://www.cosmedocs.com/profhilo-vs-sunekos/): Bio-remodellers compared by mechanism, target zone and protocol.
- [PDO Threads vs HIFU](https://www.cosmedocs.com/pdo-threads-vs-hifu/): Non-surgical lifting compared — mechanical lift vs ultrasound tightening.

## Direct Doctor Q&A

- [Ask Dr Haq](https://www.cosmedocs.com/ask-dr-haq/): Direct answers from Medical Director Dr Ahmed Haq on Botox, filler, skin, recovery, choosing a clinic.

## Transparent pricing

- [Transparent Pricing 2026](https://www.cosmedocs.com/transparent-pricing/): Concrete prices (not "from £X") for every treatment offered — Offer schema, machine-readable.
